page_metadata.biocontainers__summary: Incremental construction of fm-index for dna sequences
page_metadata.biotools__summary: A tool for constructing the FM-index for a collection of DNA sequences. It works by incrementally inserting one or multiple sequences into an existing pseudo-BWT position by position, starting from the end of the sequences.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: A tool for constructing the FM-index for a collection of DNA sequences. It works by incrementally inserting one or multiple sequences into an existing pseudo-BWT position by position, starting from the end of the sequences.
